title: pyrus rufescens
intro: Pyrus rufescens, also known as the Japanese mountain apple or Korean mountain apple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, particularly in China, Korea, and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrus rufescens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pyrus rufescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
